assumptions: Runner rules win over the specialist skill's single-location skip: restaurant page families (occasion/menu-category/search-intent/neighborhood/story) are the depth model; the seam is documented inside the artifact's pageMatrixStrategy.seamNote.

Menu section slugs (sandwiches-wraps, bowls, platters, mediterranean-delight, wings, kids-meals, desserts) normalize the 7 real sections observed on pitakababcr.com/menu in Phase 0; exact item lists and prices are captured (or omitted) at Phase 4 authoring against owner confirmation.
Legacy-URL parity (/catering/, /family-dinner/, /order/) is handled via redirects only if the owner confirms replace-mode for pitakababcr.com; recorded as a dependency, not a page.

Neighborhood pages assume genuine town facts can be captured at Phase 4 for the 8 planned entries; any town missing the schema minima folds by omitting its data entry (plan-time and build-time folds agree).
verification: inspect-artifact phase 2: ok=true, problems=[], recommendation 'Artifact satisfies the phase contract; complete-phase may seal it.' (clean on first run).

All six required artifact fields non-null: pageMatrix (46 internal page entries, all path-based, zero external links), pageMatrixStrategy (named model 'Restaurant Page-Family Matrix v1' + 6 page families), foldedPages (13 entries with named reasons), requiredCroBlocks (mirrors cro-contract with owner-input dependencies flagged), imageSlotPlan (32 slots, representational-only constraints), minimumPageCountRationale (46 planned, 41-page floor with all conditionals dropped, 25-500 gate satisfied).

Every pageMatrix entry maps to an engine restaurant-archetype route kind (home / menu-hub / menu-category / occasion / root-landing / neighborhood / contact) verified against packages/engine/templates/archetypes/restaurant; route count equals data entries (7 menu + 10 occasions + 18 landings + 8 neighborhoods + 3 fixed); reserved root slugs (menu, contact, occasions, neighborhoods) avoided.

Evidence discipline: every page's evidenceBasis cites sealed Phase 0/1 findings; 5 pages flagged conditional on owner confirmation (4 halal-gated + 1 craft-claim-gated); near-me/neighborhood family conservatively sized at 8 because local-pack was never observed; no fabricated claims, prices, or local facts appear in any brief.
Artifact references the Yahya/founder checklist (ownerChecklistReference -> phase-0 owner-questionnaire.md) and the post-seal gates (Yahya approval + page-matrix-depth review).
complete-phase NOT run per dispatch stop condition.
